notes: Single header row containing three alignment groups: left (recruitment CTA text), center (Royal Navy logo/crest), right (hamburger menu icon)
Header overlays the hero section with a semi-transparent/dark background
Navigation is a full-screen overlay panel triggered by hamburger icon — not a traditional multi-row header with dropdown menus
The hamburger icon is visible at desktop viewport (1440px), indicating the site uses a full-screen nav overlay at all breakpoints
A thin horizontal line separates the header from the hero content below
